Item.name: SheZhiMeiShengDaoShiZhongShu
Item.text: Set The Number Of Clocks Per Channel

Item.name: SheZhiMeiShengDaoShuJuWeiShu
Item.text: Set The Data Bits Of Each Channel

Item.name: ZiXiaoZhengZhongQingDengDai_DangQianJinDu_
Item.text: Self Correction, Please Wait. Current Progress:

Item.name: ZhiDingTiShi
Item.text: The attenuation at the cutoff frequency is fixed at 3 dB (Half of the passband power).

Item.name: FengZhiYiDaoZhongXin
Item.text: Set Current Frequency As The Center

Item.name: BaoCunShuJuZhong_QingDengDai
Item.text: Saving Data, Please Do Not Perform Other Operations！！！Current progress：

Item.name: BoXingWeiFenFenXi_CeLiangKaiGuanJingTiGuanZaiKaiGuanGuoChengZhongDianYaHuoDianLiuBoXingDeBianHuaLv__n_nCeLiangBuZou__n1_JiangChaFenTanZhen_DuanYuJingTiGuanDeLouJiXiangLian__n2_ChaFenTanZhen_DuanLianJieDaoJingTiGuanDeYuanJi__n3_
Item.text: Waveform differentiation analysis: measures the rate of change in voltage or current waveform of a switching transistor during the switching process. \Measurement steps: \ N1. Connect the differential probe+end to the drain of the transistor. \n2. Differential Probe - Terminal connected to the source of the transistor. \n3

Item.name: JiangDianLiuTanTouYuJingTiGuanDeYuanJiXiangLian
Item.text: Connect The Current Probe To The Source Of The Transistor

Item.name: DianYuanXiaoLvFenXiMiaoShu
Item.text:
Power Efficiency Analysis: Power Efficiency Analysis Measures The Input Power And Output Power Of A Power Supply, And Then Calculates The Efficiency Of The Power Supply Based On The Ratio Of Output Power To Input Power.
Measurement steps: Connect The Voltage Probe And Current Probe As Shown In The Diagram.

Item.name: LangYongDianLiuCeLiang_LangYongDianLiuShiZhiSheBeiDiYiCiKaiJiShiXiShouDeZuiDaShunShiShuRuDianLiu__n_nCeLiangBuZou_JiangDianLiuTanTouAnZuoCeDianLuTuJinXingLianJie
Item.text:
Inrush current: At the moment of turning on the switch power supply, the peak current flowing into the power equipment is much higher than the stable current.
Measurement steps: connect the current probe according to the schematic diagram.

Item.name: DiaoZhiFenXi_DiaoZhiFenXiTongChangYongYuBiaoZhengCongZhiLiuShuChuDaoKaiGuanJingTiGuanZhaJiZhongDuanDeMaiKuanDiaoZhiFanKui__n_nCeLiangBuZou_JiangDianYaTanTouHeDianLiuTanTouAnZuoCeDeCeLiangYuanLiTuLianJieHao_
Item.text: Modulation analysis: Modulation analysis is commonly used to characterize the pulse width modulation feedback from the DC output to the gate terminal of the switching transistor. \Measurement steps: Connect the voltage probe and current probe according to the measurement principle diagram on the left.

Item.name: ShunTaiFenXiCeLiang_ShunTaiFenXiZhuYaoShiCeLiangLeZhiLiuShuChuDeFuZaiShunTaiXiangYing_JiZaiFuZaiBianHuaQiJianZhiLiuShuChuWenDingSuoXuDeShiJian__n_nCeLiangBuZou_JiangDianLiuTanTouHeDianYaTanTouCanKaoZuoBianLianJieTuShi
Item.text: Transient analysis measurement: Transient analysis mainly measures the load transient response of the DC output, that is, the time required for the DC output to stabilize during load changes. \Measurement steps: Connect the current probe and voltage probe with reference to the diagram on the left for connection.

Item.name: XieBoFenXi_XieBoCeShiZhuYaoShiCeLiangDianYuanShuRuDuanDeDianLiu_DianYaDeXieBoQingKuang_TongGuoCeChuShuRuDianYuanXianShangDeDianYaYuDianLiuDeChuQiXieBoZhiLaiFenXiDianYuanZaiShuRuGuoChengSuoShouDeYingXiang__n_nCeLiangBuZou_JiangDianYaTanTouHeDianLiuTanTouAnZuoCeDeCeLiangYuanLiTuLianJieHao_
Item.text:
Harmonic analysis: Harmonic test mainly measures the harmonic situation of the current/voltage at the input end of the power supply.By measuring the voltage and current on the input power line, the harmonic value is obtained to analyze the impact of the power supply during the input process.
Measurement steps: Connect the voltage probe and current probe according to the measurement principle diagram on the left.

Item.name: HuanLuFenXi_GeiKaiGuanDianYuanDianLuZhuRuYiGePinLvBuDuanBianHuaDeZhengXianBoXinHaoZuoWeiGanRaoXinHao_GenJuQiShuChuQingKuangLaiPanDuanGaiDianLuXiTongDuiGeGePinLvGanRaoXinHaoDeDiaoZhengNengLi__n_nCeLiangBuZou_JiangDianYaTanTou1_2HeAWGShuChuAnYuanLiTuLianJie_
Item.text:
Loop analysis: Inject a sine signal with constantly changing frequency into the switching power supply circuit as an interference signal, and judge the circuit system's ability to adjust various frequency interference signals based on its output situation.
Measurement steps: Connect voltage probes 1, 2, and AWG outputs according to the schematic diagram.

Item.name: DianYuanZhiLiangFenXi_CeLiangShuRuDianYaHeDianLiuYiJiChanShengDeGongLv_CeShiJieGuoFanYingLeShuRuJiaoLiuXianLuDeZhiLiang__n_nCeLiangBuZou_JiangDianYaTanTouHeDianLiuTanTouAnTuShiLianJie_
Item.text:
Power quality analysis: Measure the input voltage, current, and generated power, and the test results reflect the quality of the input AC circuit.
Measurement steps: Connect the voltage probe and current probe as shown in the diagram.

Item.name: KaiGuanSunHao_KaiGuanSunHaoFenXiCeLiangKaiGuanQiJianZaiJingTiGuanDeKaiGuanJieDuanHeChuanDaoJieDuanDeGongLvHeNengLiangSunShi__n_nCeLiangBuZou_JiangDianYaTanTouHuoDianLiuTanTouAnTuShiJinXingLianJie_
Item.text:
Switching loss: Switching loss analysis measures the power and energy losses of switching devices during the switching and conduction stages of transistors.
Measurement steps: Connect the voltage probe or current probe according to the diagram.

Item.name: WenBoFenXi_CeLiangDianYuanShuChuZhiLiuXinHaoDeFengDaoFengJiZhi_KeHengLiangDianYuanDeDianYaDiaoJieNengLiHeLvBoDeZhiLiang__n_nCeLiangBuZou_JiangDianYaTanTouHuoDianLiuTanTouAnTuShiJinXingLianJie_
Item.text:
Ripple analysis: Measure the peak-to-peak extreme value of the DC signal output by the power supply,which can measure the voltage regulation ability and filtering quality of the power supply.
Measurement steps: Connect the voltage probe according to the diagram.

Item.name: AnQuanGongZuoQu_CeLiangShuRuDianYaHeDianLiuYiJiChanShengDeGongLv_CeShiJieGuoFanYingLeShuRuJiaoLiuXianLuDeZhiLiang__n_nCeLiangBuZou_JiangDianYaTanTouHeDianLiuTanTouAnTuShiLianJie_
Item.text:
SOA: An X-Y graph measuring the voltage and current of the switching device. The precisely regulated SOA template provides pass/fail results for component specification testing.
Measurement steps: Connect the voltage probe and current probe as shown in the diagram.

Item.name: Rdson_RdsonFenXiCeLiang
Item.text:
Rds(on): Rds(on) analyze and measure the equivalent resistance value of switch devices during the steady-state conduction of transistors.
Measurement steps: Connect the voltage probe or current probe as shown in the diagram.

Item.name: KaiQiGuanBiShiJian_FenXiCeLiang
Item.text:
Turn On Time: Analyze and measure the response time of the power device from the input voltage reaching 10% of the peak voltage to the output voltage reaching 90% of the peak voltage when the power supply is turned on.
Turn Off Time: Analyze and measure the response time of the power device from the input voltage reaching 10% of the peak voltage to the output voltage reaching 10% of the peak output voltage after the power is turned off.
Measurement steps: Connect the voltage probe as shown in the diagram.

Item.name: ZhuanHuanSuLvMiaoShu
Item.text:
Slew Rate: Measure the current conversion rate (di/dt) and voltage conversion rate (dv/dt) of the power supply. di/dt: Represents the rate of change of current over time, which is the amount of change in current per unit of time. dv/dt: Represents the rate of change of voltage over time, which is the amount of change in voltage per unit of time.
Measurement steps: Connect the voltage probe and current probe according to the diagram.

Item.name: PSRRDescription
Item.text:
PSRR: An important parameter for measuring the ability of a circuit to suppress changes in power supply voltage. It describes the degree to which a circuit can suppress power supply voltage fluctuations and maintain output stability.
Measurement steps: Connect Voltage Probes 1, 2, And Awg Outputs According To The Schematic Diagram.

Item.name: ModulationAnalysisDescription
Item.text:
Modulation Analysis: By measuring and analyzing parameters such as frequency, period, duty cycle, and pulse width of modulation signals, the efficiency, stability, and reliability of the system can be improved.
measurement Steps: Connect The Voltage Probe And Current Probe As Shown In The Diagram.

Item.name: TiShi_QingZhengQueJieRuWaiChuFaXinHao_FouZeAWGWuXinHaoShuChu_
Item.text: Tip: Please correctly connect the external trigger signal; otherwise, there will be no signal output from the AWG!

Item.name: ShiJian_MuBiaoWenDu_TongDaoFengShanZhuanSu_CH1_CH2_CH3_CH4_Pcie_Fpga_Pcie_Board1_Pcie_Board2_Pro_Fpfa_Acq_Fpga_Acq_Board
Item.text: Time, Target Temperature, Channel Fan Speed, Ch1, Ch2, Ch3, Ch4, Pcie_fpga, Pcie_ Board1, Pcie_ Board2, Pro_ Fpfa, Acq_ Fpga, Acq_ Board

Item.name: IPDiZhiGeShiBuDui
Item.text: The Ip Address Format Is Incorrect

Item.name: ZiWangYanMaGeShiBuDui
Item.text: The Subnet Mask Format Is Incorrect

Item.name: WangGuanDiZhiGeShiBuDui
Item.text: The Gateway Address Format Is Incorrect

Item.name: ZhuDNSDiZhiGeShiBuDui
Item.text: The Primary Dns Address Format Is Incorrect

Item.name: BeiYongDNSDiZhiGeShiBuDui
Item.text: The Alternate Dns Address Format Is Incorrect

Item.name: yyyyNianMMYueddRi
Item.text: yyyy Year mm Month dd Day

Item.name: TemperatureDiffWarning
Item.text: The temperature difference inside the system is too large; it will be automatically corrected. Please confirm that all input signals have been removed.

Item.name: HighVoltageWaningStr
Item.text: input high voltage, which may damage the device, the software has automatically switched to high resistance, please disconnect the input

Item.name: JitterParams_TjBER
Item.text: Total Jitter At A Specific Ber

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_MD2G
Item.text: 将示波器最大存储深度扩展至1Gpts/CH（全通道）2Gpts/CH（半通道）

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_BW-10T20
Item.text: Upgrade From 1GHz To 2GHz Bandwidth, MSO7104X To MSO7204X

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_AWG
Item.text: Dual Channel 60 MHz Arbitrary Wave Generator

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_JITTER
Item.text: Advanced Jitter And Eye Diagram Analysis

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_SENT
Item.text: Serial Trigger And Decode of Automotive Sensors (Send)

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_AUDIO
Item.text: Audio Serial Trigger And Decode (I2S, LJ, RJ, TDM)

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_AERO
Item.text: Aerospace Serial Trigger And Decode (MIL-STD-1553, ARINC 429)

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_SMBUS
Item.text: Embedded Serial Bus Trigger And Analysis Option (SMBus)

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_SPMI
Item.text: Power Management Serial Bus Trigger And Analysis Option (SPMI)

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_I3C
Item.text: MIPI-I3C Bus Trigger And Analysis Options (I3C)

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_USB2
Item.text: USB Bus Trigger And Analysis Options (USB2.0)

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_PCIe2
Item.text: PCIe Bus Trigger And Analysis Options (PCIe1.0, 2.0)

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_MAT
Item.text: Matlab Embedded Programming Option That Allows Users To Create Matlab Code To Customize Mathematical Functions

Item.name: AboutForm_OptionType_BND
Item.text: Upgrade Kits (Jitter, PWR, CAN-FD, Flexy, Sent, Audio, Aero)

Item.name: ProgramCS_StartError
Item.text: Startup Exception, Please Check The Error Log! Error Code:

Item.name: ProgramCS_S00072_S00073_Error
Item.text: Startup Exception,Please restart the software！Error Code:

Item.name: MaximumAllowable
Item.text: The Allowed Range of Input Values Is:

Item.name: XiaoShuWeiShuErrorMsg
Item.text: Exceed the maximum decimal place range!

Item.name: ZiFuShuErrorMsg
Item.text: Exceed the maximum characters place range!

Item.name: ProgramCS_ACQError
Item.text: Acquisition error, please restart the software!

Item.name: MsgTipId.Unused2
Item.text: The number of waveform displays has reached its maximum.

Item.name: MsgTipId.SearchItemsMaximum
Item.text: The number of search items has reached its maximum.

Item.name: MsgTipId.DeleteMeasureItems
Item.text: Do you want to clear all measure items ?

Item.name: MsgTipId.NoPermissionToAccessThisPath
Item.text: Access to this path is restricted. Please choose another path.

Item.name: MsgTipId.FormulaEndlessLoopDef
Item.text: Illegal Formula: \ Tformula Is An Infinite Loop

Item.name: MsgTipId.FormulaUndef
Item.text: Illegal Formula: \ T'mx 'formula Is Not Defined

Item.name: MsgTipId.SetFreqFail
Item.text: Frequency threshold setting is out of range.

Item.name: MsgTipId.OnlyOneAnalysis
Item.text: Note: The functions of pass/fail test, power measurement, and serial data analysis cannot be turned on simultaneously.

Item.name: MsgTipId.SDAPrepare
Item.text: Data for serial analysis is being collected, please wait...

Item.name: MsgTipId.SDAAnalysis
Item.text: Starting to analyze serial data, please wait...

Item.name: MsgTipId.Unused3
Item.text: The number of math channels has reached the system's maximum.

Item.name: MsgTipId.SdaInputError
Item.text: The input signal amplitude is too small.

Item.name: MsgTipId.ErrorHappenedCheckIt
Item.text: Analysis has encountered an issue. Please check the settings and input signals.

Item.name: MsgTipId.NoMoreChannels
Item.text: The number of channels of this type has reached the system's maximum, or the channel has already been opened.

Item.name: MsgTipId.NoMoreMeasuerLabel
Item.text: Add limit reached, remove or modify measurement parameters.

Item.name: MsgTipId.MeasuerLabelExisted
Item.text: This parameter already exists, please do not configure or add it again.

Item.name: MsgTipId.NoMoreRefChannels
Item.text: The callback window has reached the system maximum.

Item.name: MsgTipId.NotInstallExcel
Item.text: Microsoft Excel is not installed, unable to save!

Item.name: MsgTipId.ResolutionMismatch
Item.text: Does not fit the current screen resolution!

Item.name: MsgTipId.FileExisted
Item.text: The file already exists, do you want to overwrite it?

Item.name: MsgTipId.FileOccupied
Item.text: Save failed! The file is open in another application, please close the file and try again!

Item.name: MsgTipId.CheckDiskSpaceError
Item.text: Save failed! An exception occurred while checking disk space!

Item.name: MsgTipId.NoMoreDiskSpace
Item.text: Save failed! Not enough disk space!

Item.name: MsgTipId.UnknownErrorSaveData
Item.text: An unknown error occurred, possibly insufficient disk space or an abnormal file

Item.name: MsgTipId.TimeOutSaveData
Item.text: Saving deep storage data timed out

Item.name: MsgTipId.RestoreFactoryDefault
Item.text: Do you want to restore the default settings?

Item.name: MsgTipId.UndoFactoryDefault
Item.text: Do you want to undo default restore?

Item.name: MsgTipId.UndoFactoryDefaultErr
Item.text: Failed to undo the restoration of default settings!

Item.name: MsgTipId.SwitchSettingFile
Item.text: Do you want to switch the system settings file?

Item.name: MsgTipId.AppClose
Item.text: Do you want to exit the program?

Item.name: MsgTipId.ComputerShutDown
Item.text: Do you want to turn off the device?

Item.name: MsgTipId.ComputerRestart
Item.text: Do you want to restart the device?

Item.name: MsgTipId.UserLogOut
Item.text: Do you want to log out the current user?

Item.name: MsgTipId.SetIPAddressFail
Item.text: Ip address and subnet mask settings failed

Item.name: MsgTipId.RemovableStorageDiscovered
Item.text: A removable storage device is detected, do you want to set this device as the save path?

Item.name: MsgTipId.AdministrtorAuthorityRequired
Item.text: Administrator privileges are required for setting!

Item.name: MsgTipId.SDADataAmplitudeDiffTooSmall
Item.text: SDA data amplitude difference is too small, unable to recover UI!

Item.name: MsgTipId.FewUINumber
Item.text: Too Few UI Numbers Or Too Few Individual UI Points,Eye Diagram Cannot Be Overlaid!

Item.name: MsgTipId.SDADataCyclesTooFew
Item.text: SDA data cycle is too few, unable to measure TIE!

Item.name: MsgTipId.AccessToFolderFailed
Item.text: This path does not have access permission, the default storage path has been restored!

Item.name: MsgTipId.AuxInTriggerTip
Item.text: Tip: Please input the signal through the AUX IN interface., otherwise the oscilloscope will not be able to trigger!

Item.name: MsgTipId.AuxInSyncAWGTip
Item.text: Tip: Please input the signal through the AUX IN interface., otherwise there will be no signal output from AWG!

Item.name: MsgTipId.SOASaveError
Item.text: Save failed, please check the data!

Item.name: MsgTipId.SOALoadMaskError
Item.text: Template import failed, please check the data!

Item.name: MsgTipId.FilePathNotExist
Item.text: The storage location does not exist, the default storage location has been restored!

Item.name: MsgTipId.AutoCalibration
Item.text: Please confirm if all input signals have been removed

Item.name: MsgTipId.DataLengthIsInsufficient
Item.text: Insufficient data length, please increase storage depth

Item.name: MsgTipId.DataLengthIsTooLarge
Item.text: The data length is too large and has been trimmed

Item.name: MsgTipId.AUXOutIsRequired
Item.text: Please connect the cable to the aux out interface on the back of the unit.

Item.name: MsgTipId.AUXInIsRequired
Item.text: Please connect the signal to the aux in interface on the back of the unit.

Item.name: MsgTipId.AWGProtected1
Item.text: AWG channel 1 has triggered hardware protection, please unplug the AWG channel 1 port cable

Item.name: MsgTipId.AWGProtected2
Item.text: AWG channel 2 has triggered hardware protection, please unplug the AWG channel 2 port cable

Item.name: MsgTipId.AWGProtected3
Item.text: AWG channel 3 has triggered hardware protection, please unplug the AWG channel 3 port cable

Item.name: MsgTipId.AWGProtected4
Item.text: AWG channel 4 has triggered hardware protection, please unplug the AWG channel 4 port cable

Item.name: MsgTipId.AWGModeModulation
Item.text: Modulation mode: the carrier can only be sine wave, square wave, pulse wave, triangle wave, and arbitrary wave.

Item.name: MsgTipId.AWGModeSweep
Item.text: Frequency sweep mode: the carrier can only be sine wave, square wave, triangle wave, and arbitrary wave.

Item.name: MsgTipId.DigitalOccupyAnalog
Item.text: Digital channel is open, analog channel (C3, C4) is occupied.

Item.name: MsgTipId.StopBanDigital
Item.text: Operations of digital channels are prohibited in the stop state.

Item.name: MsgTipId.FunctionBanDigital
Item.text: Functions mutual exclusion! Prohibit operation of digital channels.

Item.name: MsgTipId.DigitalMutex
Item.text: Functions mutual exclusion! Close digital channels?

Item.name: MsgTipId.ChannelUITooLess
Item.text: The current channel has too few cycles. It is recommended to increase the storage depth or reset the time base.

Item.name: MsgTipId.ScanIsNotSupportedInFast
Item.text: UltraAcq mode is not supported for roll operations.

Item.name: MsgTipId.DemoIsNotSupportedInFast
Item.text: UltraAcq mode is not supported for demo operations.

Item.name: MsgTipId.FastIsNotSupportedInScan
Item.text: Roll mode is not supported for UltraAcq operations.

Item.name: MsgTipId.MathIsNotSupportedInScan
Item.text: Roll mode is not supported for math operations.

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisIsNotSupportedInScan
Item.text: Roll mode is not supported for power analysis.

Item.name: MsgTipId.JitterIsNotSupportedInScan
Item.text: Roll mode is not supported for jitter analysis.

Item.name: MsgTipId.PassFailIsNotSupportedInScan
Item.text: Roll mode is not supported for R/F test.

Item.name: MsgTipId.DecodeIsNotSupportedInScan
Item.text: Roll mode is not supported on the bus.

Item.name: MsgTipId.DecodeNotSupportedMoreThan250MStorageDepth
Item.text: The bus does not support storage depth above 250M

Item.name: MsgTipId.DecodeIsSupportedMinTimebase
Item.text: Out of timebase scale range on the bus.

Item.name: MsgTipId.SegementIsNotSupportedInScan
Item.text: Sequence mode does not support roll mode.

Item.name: MsgTipId.SegementIsNotSupportedInPowerAnalysis
Item.text: Sequential mode is incompatible with power analysis, do you want to turn off power analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.SegementIsNotSupportedInJitter
Item.text: Sequential mode is incompatible with jitter analysis, do you want to turn off jitter analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.SegementIsNotSupportedInPassFail
Item.text: Sequential mode is incompatible with R/F test, do you want to turn off R/F test?

Item.name: MsgTipId.SegementIsNotSupportedInDecode
Item.text: Sequential mode is incompatible with the bus, do you want to turn off the bus?

Item.name: MsgTipId.SegementIsNotSupportedInThisAcqMode
Item.text: Sequential mode is incompatible with this sampling mode, please change the sampling mode.

Item.name: MsgTipId.SegementIsNotSupportedInThisTriggerMode
Item.text: Sequential mode is incompatible with this trigger mode, please change the trigger mode.

Item.name: MsgTipId.SingleTriggerIsNotSupportedInSegement
Item.text: Sequential mode cannot be single triggered. Please turn off sequential mode.

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisIsNotSupportedInJitter
Item.text: Power analysis is incompatible with jitter analysis, do you want to turn off jitter analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisIsNotSupportedInPassFail
Item.text: Power analysis is incompatible with P/F test, do you want to turn off P/F test?

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisIsNotSupportedInDecode
Item.text: Power analysis is incompatible with the bus, do you want to turn off the bus?

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisIsNotSupportedInSegment
Item.text: Power analysis is incompatible with sequential mode, do you want to turn off sequential mode?

Item.name: MsgTipId.PwrAnalysisIsNotSupportedInLA
Item.text: Power analysis is incompatible with the digital, do you want to turn off the digital?

Item.name: MsgTipId.JitterIsNotSupportedInPowerAnalysis
Item.text: Jitter analysis is incompatible with power analysis, do you want to turn off power analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.JitterIsNotSupportedInPassFail
Item.text: Jitter analysis is incompatible with the R/F test, do you want to turn off R/F test?

Item.name: MsgTipId.JitterIsNotSupportedInDecode
Item.text: Jitter analysis is incompatible with the bus, do you want to turn off the bus?

Item.name: MsgTipId.JitterIsNotSupportedInSegment
Item.text: Jitter analysis is incompatible with sequential mode, do you want to turn off sequential mode?

Item.name: MsgTipId.JitterIsNotSupportedInLA
Item.text: Jitter analysis is incompatible with the digital, do you want to turn off the digital?

Item.name: MsgTipId.JitterIsNotSupportedInFFT
Item.text: Jitter analysis is incompatible with FFT, do you want to turn off FFT?

Item.name: MsgTipId.FFTIsNotSupportedInJitter
Item.text: FFT is incompatible with jitter analysis, do you want to turn off jitter analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.PassFailIsNotSupportedInPowerAnalysis
Item.text: P/F test is incompatible with the power analysis, do you want to turn off power analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.PassFailIsNotSupportedInJitter
Item.text: P/F test is incompatible with jitter analysis, do you want to turn off jitter analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.PassFailIsNotSupportedInDecode
Item.text: P/F test is incompatible with the bus, do you want to turn off the bus?

Item.name: MsgTipId.PassFailIsNotSupportedInSegment
Item.text: P/F test is incompatible with sequential mode, do you want to turn off sequential mode?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DecodeIsNotSupportedInPowerAnalysis
Item.text: The bus is incompatible with power analysis, do you want to turn off power analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DecodeIsNotSupportedInJitter
Item.text: The bus is incompatible with jitter analysis, do you want to turn off jitter analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DecodeIsNotSupportedInPassFail
Item.text: The bus is incompatible with the P/F test, do you want to turn off R/F test?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DecodeIsNotSupportedInSegment
Item.text: The bus is incompatible with sequential mode, do you want to turn off sequential mode?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DecodeIsNotSupportedInLA
Item.text: The bus is incompatible with the digital, do you want to turn off the digital?

Item.name: MsgTipId.MathIsNotSupportedInLA
Item.text: The math is incompatible with the digital, do you want to turn off the digital?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DigitalIsNotSupportedInDecode
Item.text: The digital is incompatible with the bus, do you want to turn off the bus?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DigitalIsNotSupportedInMath
Item.text: The digital is incompatible with the math, do you want to turn off the math?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DigitalIsNotSupportedInPowerAnalysis
Item.text: The digital is incompatible with the power analysis, do you want to turn off the power analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DigitalIsNotSupportedInJitter
Item.text: The digital is incompatible with jitter analysis, do you want to turn off jitter analysis?

Item.name: MsgTipId.DigitalIsNotSupportedInLissajous
Item.text: The digital is incompatible with the Lissajous, do you want to turn off the Lissajous?

Item.name: MsgTipId.LissajousIsNotSupportedInDigital
Item.text: The Lissajous is incompatible with the digital, do you want to turn off the digital?

Item.name: MsgTipId.TimeMinScaleBy2_5G
Item.text: This interleaving mode supports a minimum of 500ps/div, and has been automatically switched!

Item.name: MsgTipId.TimeMinScaleBy5G
Item.text: This interleaving mode supports a minimum of 200ps/div, and has been automatically switched!

Item.name: MsgTipId.PurchaseOptions
Item.text: This function is not available, please contact your supplier or the manufacturer to purchase the option!

Item.name: MsgTipId.OptionActiveSuccess
Item.text: Option activation successful, please use it boldly!!!

Item.name: MsgTipId.OptionActiveFail
Item.text: Option activation failed, please contact the supplier or manufacturer to obtain a new license certificate

Item.name: MsgTipId.OptionActived
Item.text: Option activated, please do not activate again!

Item.name: MsgTipId.LicenseFileFormatError
Item.text: The license certificate is in the wrong format and cannot be recognized

Item.name: MsgTipId.LicenseRemoveYesOrNo
Item.text: Please confirm if you want to remove the license certificate

Item.name: MsgTipId.CurrentChannelAmpTooLow
Item.text: In jitter, signal amplitude is too small

Item.name: MsgTipId.CurrentChannelNoData
Item.text: Due to jitter, unable to retrieve the current source channel data.

Item.name: MsgTipId.RefFileError1
Item.text: Abnormal waveform file reading, file format is incorrect or incompatible!

Item.name: MsgTipId.RefFileError2
Item.text: The waveform file is too large, files over 1MB are not supported at the moment!

Item.name: MsgTipId.RunningLoopAnalysisTip
Item.text: Loop analysis is running, please wait.

Item.name: MsgTipId.CompletedLoopAnalysisTip
Item.text: Loop analysis is completed, please view the results.

Item.name: MsgTipId.RunningPSRRTip
Item.text: PSRR is running, please try to avoid other operations affecting its operation as much as possible!

Item.name: MsgTipId.CompletedPSRRTip
Item.text: PSRR operation completed, please check the results!

Item.name: MsgTipId.AuxOutputSetPassFail
Item.text: The secondary output item is automatically set to pass the test!

Item.name: MsgTipId.ProbeUnavailable
Item.text: Cannot use high impedance passive probe, please remove or replace the probe!

Item.name: MsgTipId.FileSaveCheck
Item.text: The storage source selection is incorrect, please reselect the storage source!

Item.name: MsgTipId.HistBinNumberTooFew
Item.text: The jitter histogram has too few BINs!

Item.name: MsgTipId.RestartingProgram
Item.text: Restarting the oscilloscope software takes effect

Item.name: MsgTipId.FunctionDisabled
Item.text: This function has been disabled. If you need to enable it, enable it in system settings - function components

Item.name: MsgTipId.ProbeCaliRefSigUnInput
Item.text: Probe connection to the oscilloscope square wave terminal is not detected. Please connect the probe to the oscilloscope square wave terminal and click 'Yes'. If you wish to abort the calibration process, click 'No'.

Item.name: MsgTipId.ProbeCaliCannotInput
Item.text: The probe is not in an open state. Please move the probe head to maintain an open state and click 'Yes'. If you wish to abort the calibration process, click 'No'.

Item.name: MsgTipId.ProbeCaliRefSigRemove
Item.text: Before performing bias calibration, please keep the front probe of the probe suspended.

Item.name: MsgTipId.ProbeCaliNoiseChecked
Item.text: Detected excessive noise, please short-circuit the front probe of the probe.

Item.name: MsgTipId.AcqModeCannotSet
Item.text: In The UltraAcq Mode, The Sampling Mode Cannot Be Set To Average Or Envelope!

Item.name: MsgTipId.JitterSourceClose
Item.text: Closing This Channel Will Delete Jitter Analysis!

Item.name: SettingForm.NbgSetting.TlpNavBarContainer.AuxOutputPage.LblAuxInTip
Item.text: Tip: Please correctly connect the external trigger signal; otherwise, there will be no signal output from the AWG!

Item.name: KeyboardDetectionForm.LblHintOneText
Item.text: Press RUN/STOP three times in a row to exit self-test mode!!!

Item.name: KeyboardDetectionForm.LblHintTwoText
Item.text: Please press the button on the keypad to test.

Item.name: KeyboardDetectionForm.LblHint_3
Item.text: Press the knob at any time to change the screen color!!!

Item.name: ProbeUserCaliForm.Note
Item.text: Before starting calibration, please connect the probe to the square wave terminal as shown in the following figure.

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisCloseSourceAndClickNext
Item.text: Please turn off the power and click next

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisOpenSourceAndClickNext
Item.text: Please turn on the power and click next

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisNoSignal
Item.text: No signal that meets the criteria was detected!

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisWaitForTriggerReady
Item.text: Power analysis: Waiting for trigger preparation, please do not operate!

Item.name: MsgTipId.PowerAnalysisWaitForTriggerCompleted
Item.text: Power analysis: Waiting for trigger completion, please do not operate!

Item.name: MsgTipId.AC2DCTurnOnCompleted
Item.text: The AC-DC turn on time test has been completed，please review the results.

Item.name: MsgTipId.AC2DCTurnOffCompleted
Item.text: The AC-DC turn off time test has been completed，please review the results.

Item.name: MsgTipId.DC2DCTurnOnCompleted
Item.text: The DC-DC turn on time test has been completed，please review the results.

Item.name: MsgTipId.DC2DCTurnOffCompleted
Item.text: The DC-DC turn off time test has been completed，please review the results.

Item.name: CustomFormulaForm.TlpEditor.LblDescription
Item.text: Choose the desired operator and operand to construct the formula, and operators with built-in left parentheses must complete the right ones.

Item.name: ScopeX.ComModel.ProtocolPCIe.Condition.EDB
Item.text: End of LL Frame Corruption Flag

Item.name: ScopeX.ComModel.ProtocolPCIe.TLPType.CplLK
Item.text: Complete No Data Reading Lock Memory

Item.name: ScopeX.ComModel.ProtocolPCIe.TLPType.CplDLK
Item.text: Complete Data Reading And Lock Memory

Item.name: ScopeX.ComModel.ProtocolSATA.FISTypeFlag.DMA_Act
Item.text: FIS DMA Slave Tx Master Rx

Item.name: ScopeX.ComModel.ProtocolSATA.FISTypeFlag.PIO
Item.text: FIS PIO Slave Tx Master Rx

Item.name: ScopeX.ComModel.ProtocolSATA.FISTypeFlag.SDB
Item.text: FIS Bit Config Slave Tx Master Rx

Item.name: MsgTipId.FilterTip1
Item.text: An odd-order symmetric FIR filter must have zero gain at the Nyquist frequency, order automatically increases by one.

Item.name: MsgTipId.FilterTip2
Item.text: Remez filter order must be at least 4，order automatically increases by two.

Item.name: MsgTipId.MatlabUninstalled
Item.text: No Matlab software installation detected, please install Matlab by yourself.
